dpo.duty1: Provide advice to the Data Controller or Data Processor, including their employees or contractors, regarding compliance with the Personal Data Protection Act.
dpo.duty2: Inspect the operations of the Data Controller or Data Processor, including their employees or contractors, regarding the collection, use, or disclosure of personal data to ensure compliance with the law.
dpo.duty3: Coordinate and cooperate with the Office of the Personal Data Protection Commission in cases of issues related to the collection, use, or disclosure of personal data.
dpo.duty4: Maintain strict confidentiality of any personal data known or acquired through the performance of duties, in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act.
